challenge.title: Ugnjezdi Anchor Element Unutar Paragrafa
challenge.description:
Mozete ugnjezditi linkove unutar drugih tekstualnih elemenata.

<p>
  Here's a <a target="_blank" href="https://www.freecodecamp.org"> link to www.freecodecamp.org</a> for you to follow.
</p>

Hajde da razlozimo ovaj primer. Obican tekst je obavijen p elementom:

<p> Here's a ... for you to follow. </p>

Sledece je anchor <a> element (koji zahteva zatvarajuci tag </a>):

<a> ... </a>

target je atribut anchor elementa koji odredjuje gde ce se otvoriti link. Vrednost _blank znaci da se link otvara u novom tabu. href je atribut anchor elementa koji sadrzi URL adresu linka:

<a href="https://www.freecodecamp.org" target="_blank"> ... </a>

Tekst link to www.freecodecamp.org unutar a elementa naziva se anchor text i prikazuje klikabilni link:

<a href=" ... " target="...">link to freecodecamp.org</a>

Krajnji rezultat primera izgleda ovako:

Evo linka do www.freecodecamp.org koji mozete pratiti.
challenge.instructions: Ugnjezdite postojeci a element unutar novog p elementa. Nemojte praviti novi anchor tag. Novi paragraf treba da ima tekst View more cat photos, gde je cat photos link, a ostatak obican tekst.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
CatPhotoApp

cat photos

Kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff.

Purr jump eat the grass rip the couch scratched sunbathe, shed everywhere rip the couch sleep in the sink fluffy fur catnip scratched.

tests.text: Vas a element treba da ima anchor tekst cat photos.
Treba da napravite novi p element. U vasem HTML kodu treba da postoje najmanje 3 p taga.
Vas a element treba da bude ugnjezden unutar novog p elementa.
Vas p element treba da sadrzi tekst View more (sa razmakom na kraju).
Vas a element ne treba da sadrzi tekst View more.
Svaki vas p element treba da ima zatvarajuci tag.
Svaki vas a element treba da ima zatvarajuci tag.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
The best page ever

Cat ipsum dolor sit amet, jump launch to pounce upon little yarn mouse, bare fangs at toy run hide in litter box until treats are fed. Go into a room to decide you didn't want to be in there anyway. I like big cats and i can not lie kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff. Meow i could pee on this if i had the energy for slap owner's face at 5am until human fills food dish yet scamper. Knock dish off table head butt cant eat out of my own dish scratch the furniture. Make meme, make cute face. Sleep in the bathroom sink chase laser but pee in the shoe. Paw at your fat belly licks your face and eat grass, throw it back up kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff.
